_comment: GoVallecito business + community directory. Tiers: 'featured' (rich expanded card, pinned top of category + Featured strip), 'verified' (Verified Local badge + full contact row), 'basic' (free list row). 'unpublished: true' hides a listing (slot reserved, data pending). 'featuredReady' just flags promotion candidates. Featured images live in /assets/img/featured/. Only verified fields are included; unknowns omitted (no guessing). Facebook is the live source for marina + market hours.

businesses.name: Julie Coffelt — Coldwell Banker Mountain Properties
businesses.blurb: Vallecito local broker — more than 25 years in the Four Corners. Honest, year-round guidance from a neighbor who's here to stay.

businesses.name: Vallecito Marina & Yacht Club
businesses.blurb: The only marina on the lake — fishing boats, pontoons, kayaks, and SUPs, plus slips, buoy service, fuel, and a store.
businesses.hours: Fri & Sat 8 a.m.–6 p.m. · Sun–Thu 8 a.m.–5 p.m. (May–Sep)

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Country Market & La Comida Ranchera
businesses.blurb: Groceries, the La Comida Ranchera kitchen, and liquor — plus the lake-area gas stop with non-ethanol fuel and propane, great for boats, ATVs, and small engines.

businesses.name: Blue Spruce RV Park & Cabins
businesses.blurb: RV sites (≈May–Nov) and cabins (year-round) near the lake — a relaxed, wooded basecamp for a Vallecito stay.
businesses.imageAlt: Blue Spruce RV Park & Cabins — wooded sites near Vallecito Lake
businesses.rv: Full hookups — water, sewer, 30 & 50 amp electric. RV sites ≈May 1–Nov 1; cabins year-round.

businesses.name: Coronado Consulting & Fire Mitigation
businesses.blurb: Arborist and tree care, wildfire mitigation, and defensible-space work — serving Bayfield, La Plata County, and Durango. Established 2019; certified owners.

businesses.name: Vallecito Church
businesses.blurb: A Southern Baptist church at the lake. Sunday School 9:00 AM · Worship 10:30 AM — visitors welcome.

businesses.name: Excel Excavation
businesses._note: Featured slot reserved — UNPUBLISHED pending verified data. The link David provided was a Facebook community-group member profile (a person), not a business Page; do NOT attach another excavator's info. Need: the business Facebook Page/logo, or the owner's OK + name/phone.

businesses.name: Pine River Lodge
businesses.blurb: 27 cabins overlooking the lake since 1960 — heated indoor pool, a Vallecito mainstay for families and anglers.

businesses.name: Fisher Guide Service
businesses.blurb: Trolling and spin for all species; also fishes Navajo Reservoir, plus winter ice-fishing.

businesses.name: Vallecito Lake Outfitters
businesses.blurb: Horseback rides, backcountry pack trips, hunts, and guided fishing.

businesses.name: Charter Vallecito
businesses.blurb: Capt. Barney Miller — 33+ years guiding charter fishing on the lake.

businesses.name: Go Fish Durango
businesses.blurb: Fly and pontoon guided trips around Durango and Vallecito.

businesses.name: Altitude ATV & Side-by-Side Rentals
businesses.blurb: ATV, UTV, and RZR rentals for the forest roads.

businesses.name: Weminuche Woodfire Grill
businesses.blurb: Wood-fired pizza, full bar, and live music on CR 501.
businesses.hours: Mon/Wed/Thu 4–9 · Fri–Sat 12–9 · Sun 11–8 · Tue closed (confirm on Facebook)

businesses.name: Pine River Irrigation District (PRID)
businesses.blurb: Public boat ramp, reservoir recreation permits, and published lake levels.

businesses.name: Bayfield Realty
businesses.blurb: Local real estate brokerage on CR 501.

businesses.name: 5 Branches Camper Park & Cabins
businesses.blurb: Lakeshore camper park with RV & tent sites, cabins, and cottages.
businesses.rv: Lakeshore RV & tent sites with 30-amp hookups; cabins & cottages. (Open ~Apr–Oct; call for site specifics.)

businesses.name: Cabins on Vallecito Lake
businesses.blurb: Lakeside cabins.

businesses.name: Croll Cabins
businesses.blurb: Cabins near the lake.

businesses.name: Elk Point Lodge
businesses.blurb: 11 lakefront cabins, on-site stables, and a hot tub; open year-round.

businesses.name: Elk Point Lodge Stables
businesses.blurb: Guided horseback rides at Elk Point Lodge, Thu–Mon (seasonal).

businesses.name: Rocky Mountain General Store & Custom Meats
businesses.blurb: Groceries, custom meats with elk brats, deli, and liquor.
